name: Earthquake or Water Over the Dam Dessert
recipeIngredient: 1 each German chocolate cake mix (2 layer type)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cover the bottom of a 9" x 13" x 3" baking dish with coconut.
2. Cover the coconut with chopped nuts.
3. Prepare the cake mix according to package directions and pour over the nuts.
4. In a separate bowl, combine margarine, powdered sugar, and cream cheese. Beat until smooth.
5. Spread the mixture evenly over the cake batter without stirring.
6. Bake for 1 hour at 350 degrees F.
7. Turn out onto a tray (coconut should be on top).
